description: wave-2 spine maintenance log port on the shared kernel v1.3 + the ONE wave-1 shared log-family store. maintenance is the log-family identity element (empty FarmLogType subclass, farm_log_workflow: done/pending/abandoned), distinguished only by payload.kind="maintenance". Official numerics (yield_total, log_count) are confirmed-only per the bound pending-status-gates decision (the one chosen divergence); abandoned and pending mass live in the undeclared pending-only partner projections.

divergences.reason: kernel STATUS_CONTRACT confirmed-only gate: pending AND abandoned maintenance logs are inert to log_count, whereas the observed source counts pending logs (the ONE chosen pending-gate divergence, Duke 2026-07-20). No oracle-observed maintenance fixtures at spine tier, so no fixture_id is asserted; trailing readings bind the recorded pack.

kernel STATUS_CONTRACT confirmed-only gate: pending AND abandoned maintenance logs contribute 0 to yield_total, whereas the observed source folds pending (the ONE chosen pending-gate divergence, Duke 2026-07-20). No oracle-observed maintenance fixtures at spine tier, so no fixture_id is asserted; trailing readings bind the recorded pack.
